title: Attribute
description: An Attribute is a property that belongs to a Resource. Attributes describe the data shape of a Resource — its fields, their types, and any constraints.

name.description: The snake_case name of the attribute.

type.description: The data type of the attribute.

description.description: A human-readable explanation of what this attribute represents.
examples: The principal loan amount in the base currency.
The URL-safe identifier for the post.

required.description: Whether this attribute must be present on the resource.

values.description: The allowed values when type is 'enum'.

resource.description: The referenced Resource name when type is 'reference'.

examples.name: amount
examples.description: The principal loan amount in the base currency.

examples.name: status
examples.description: The current lifecycle state of the loan.

examples.name: due_date
examples.description: The date by which the loan must be fully repaid.

examples.name: slug
examples.description: The URL-safe identifier for the post, derived from the title.

examples.name: author
examples.description: The author who wrote the post.

examples.name: published_at
examples.description: The timestamp when the post was made publicly visible.
